static_package.description: source code, docs, tests, config, resources; stable SHA after export

runtime_dynamic.description: runtime checkpoints, event ledgers, sqlite, cache; may change after startup

memory_dynamic.description: journal, layered memory and raw-memory status controlled outside static package hash

archive_payload.description: ZIP/7z payloads; do not unpack during audit unless required

active_manifest.description: sole package/release integrity manifest; not a live-runtime proof

runtime_state.description: mutable runtime/private-memory state snapshot; not a package manifest

archived_manifest_history.description: legacy historical manifests preserved for audit only

truth_boundary: PACKAGE_INTEGRITY_MANIFEST.json is the sole package integrity manifest. RUNTIME_STATE.json describes mutable state. Neither package metadata nor provenance proves a live runtime.
